photo.credit: NASA · SpaceX Crew-10 (Mar 2025) — astronauts in the SpaceX IVA pressure suit. Touch-screen gloves, single-piece front-entry, slim profile for the Crew Dragon cabin.

see_in_app.context_key: Crew-rated spacecraft entries — Soyuz, Starliner, Crew Dragon, Shenzhou — all carry an IVA pressure suit
Soyuz 11 (1971) — the only fatal in-flight decompression; the IVA suit was added afterward
